feedback: Strong contract. All 30 criteria are testable, specific, and map accurately to the actual hook source code. Cross-referenced every criterion against on-generator-stop.sh, on-evaluator-stop.sh, and on-stop.sh line by line — no validation paths are missed.

on-generator-stop.sh.assessment: Complete. All branches in lines 15-63 of the hook are covered.

validationPaths: No eval sprint and no contract review → exit 0 (C5-12)
Criteria count mismatch (fewer in report) → exit 2 (C5-17)
Valid contract review with decision → exit 0 (C5-19)
on-evaluator-stop.sh.assessment: Complete. All branches in lines 12-75 of the hook are covered.

validationPaths: No status.json in sprint dirs → exit 0 (C5-27)
on-stop.sh.assessment: Complete. All branches in lines 11-34 of the hook are covered.

fixtureAvailability.status: All referenced fixtures exist from sprint 1
fixtureAvailability.note: C5-16 (missing criteriaResults only) will need a custom fixture or inline JSON — eval-report-malformed.json is missing both overallResult AND criteriaResults. The generator should create a separate fixture (e.g. eval-report-no-criteria.json) or construct the JSON in the test. This is an implementation detail, not a contract flaw.

implementationNotes: run_hook() in test-helper.bash merges stderr into stdout (2>&1). Tests checking error messages (C5-08, C5-09, C5-14, C5-15, C5-16, C5-17, C5-20, C5-21, C5-24, C5-26, C5-30) will need to either (a) use bats 'run' directly with stderr separation, or (b) accept that 'output' contains the merged stream. The criteria say 'stderr captured via run_hook or equivalent' which gives sufficient flexibility.

Hooks hardcode HARNESS_STATE='harness-state' relative to cwd. Test isolation (C5-28) works because the test helper cd's to TEST_TEMP_DIR in setup(). The generator must ensure all hook invocations happen from within the temp dir.

The on-evaluator-stop.sh contract review loop (line 27) only searches sprint-* directories, not fix-*/refactor-*. Criteria C5-19-21 don't specify fix-*/refactor-* for contract review, which correctly matches the actual hook behavior.

regressionCheck.assessment: Correct — all completed sprints are listed.

outOfScopeCheck.assessment: Appropriate. Excludes utils.sh tests (sprints 2-3), git.sh tests (sprint 4), edge cases beyond core paths (sprint 6), the non-blocking git commit warning in on-generator-stop.sh, and test infrastructure modifications. No important scope is missing.
